understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto a goal tile marked '+'; if multiple goals exist, all must be covered by a piece at the same time to win the level and progress.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a grid position selects a piece if it lands on one or moves the currently selected piece toward that coordinate along a valid path; directional actions (e.g. MOVE_RIGHT) translate the selected piece one step in the indicated direction when unblocked. Walls and obstacles fully prevent passage, causing move attempts to fail with no position change. Selection persists across turns until a different piece is clicked, allowing control of multiple pieces.
